candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label with full values; matches target definition of total revenues/sales.
Explicit total revenue line duplicating 'Revenues'; included as secondary priority in case label changes over time.
This is cost of sales, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Component of cost of revenue, not revenue itself.
Depreciation component within COGS, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Duplicate label category-wise; still interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Component of receivables, not total revenue line.
Liability, not revenue line.
Liability, not revenue line.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenues' and 'Total Revenue' show identical top-line values; included as a priority list to capture label changes over time without double counting.

candidates.why: Standard label for cost of goods sold / cost of sales with full values; best match for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Component of COGS but not the full COGS; prefer the aggregate 'Cost of revenue' line.
Separate operating expense bucket, not direct production costs.
Non-operating other income/expenses, not COGS.
Selling expenses (SG&A), not direct COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Labor component of SG&A, not COGS.
Administrative overhead (SG&A), not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
Capitalized portion of R&D, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development
candidates.why: Labor component of R&D, not COGS.
Mixed other operating items, not direct COGS.
Aggregate operating expenses including SG&A and R&D, not pure COGS.
Finance costs, not COGS.
Specific overhead expense if present, but not COGS.
Occasional overhead expense, not COGS.
Inventory component, balance sheet item, not period COGS.
Inventory component, not income statement COGS.
Liability, not COGS.

variables.notes: The aggregated 'Cost of revenue' line best represents COGS; component and overhead lines are excluded as per instructions.

candidates.why: Generic operating expense bucket; could include SG&A but a subtotal-type line. Prefer more specific SG&A components when available.
Operating income, not expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.
Classic SG&A selling component; should be included as part of XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Labor component of SG&A; valid SG&A component to include.
Core SG&A administrative component; should be included.
Mixed income/expense; less clean as SG&A. Prefer clearly labeled SG&A components first.
Would be an SG&A component if populated, but no values shown in preview; could still be relevant historically.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A expense components and excluded subtotal-like or income/mixed lines to avoid double counting and non-operating items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of past R&D; related but not the current period R&D expense line itself.
Direct current-period R&D expense line; best match for XRD.
Depreciation component within R&D; partial, not the full R&D expense.
Capitalized portion of R&D; affects cash but not expensed R&D; not ideal as XRD itself.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development
candidates.why: Labor component of R&D; partial, not total R&D expense.
Impairments of development costs, occasional and not the recurring R&D expense.
Amortization of capitalized development costs; supplemental, not core R&D expense.
Supplemental disclosure of R&D; could be useful as backup but core line is 'Research and development expenses'.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Accumulated amortization/impairment of development costs; balance sheet, not current expense.

variables.notes: Primary R&D expense is taken from 'Research and development expenses'; the supplemental R&D disclosure is included as a secondary fallback line in case of label changes or historical use.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense on lease liabilities; relevant component of total interest expense.
Interest income, opposite sign; not appropriate as interest expense.
Generic interest expense line; best single proxy for XINT if populated.
Net finance cost/income including interest; acceptable fallback if pure interest expense lines are missing or empty.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling interests, not interest expense.
Minority interest portion, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Number of weighted average (exclude treasury shares) shares used for calculations of EPS Earnings/ (loss) per share for profit attributable to the ordinary equity holders of the parent during the period
candidates.why: EPS-related descriptive line, not interest expense.
Minority interest share of comprehensive income, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure for lease-related interest; good backup if primary interest lines are missing.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is given to the generic 'Interest Expenses' line; lease-specific and net finance cost lines are included as fallbacks to capture interest expense across all periods.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Number of weighted average (exclude treasury shares) shares used for calculations of EPS Earnings/ (loss) per share for profit attributable to the ordinary equity holders of the parent during the period
candidates.why: EPS-related line, not a balance sheet equity total.

candidates.row_label: Number of weighted average (exclude treasury shares) shares used for calculations of EPS Earnings/ (loss) per share for profit attributable to the ordinary equity holders of the parent during the period
candidates.why: Shares outstanding for EPS, not equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Equity to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to owners/parent, explicitly excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if parent equity not available.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not the target equity measure.
Total of equity plus liabilities, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Parent equity excludes non-controlling interests and thus avoids double counting when combined with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement share of profit for NCI; not the balance sheet amount but indicates presence of minority interests.
Minority interest portion from discontinued operations only; not the main NCI balance sheet figure.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Number of weighted average (exclude treasury shares) shares used for calculations of EPS Earnings/ (loss) per share for profit attributable to the ordinary equity holders of the parent during the period
candidates.why: EPS-related description, not the NCI balance amount.
Minority interests in comprehensive income, not directly the balance sheet MIB amount.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary target for MIB.
Duplicate representation of non-controlling interests with same values; good backup label for MIB.

variables.notes: Mapped to balance sheet non-controlling interest lines to capture minority equity; income statement NCI lines are not used to avoid mixing flows with stocks.
